MorpheApp/morphe-cli.name: MorpheApp/morphe-cli
MorpheApp/morphe-cli.body:
# [1.7.0](https://github.com/MorpheApp/morphe-cli/compare/v1.6.3...v1.7.0) (2026-04-16)


### Bug Fixes

* Use patcher implementation of strip libs ([#83](https://github.com/MorpheApp/morphe-cli/issues/83)) ([43f50ea](https://github.com/MorpheApp/morphe-cli/commit/43f50ea133088090648fa318047626f3166b8639))
* Use same default keystore values as Morphe Manager ([#96](https://github.com/MorpheApp/morphe-cli/issues/96)) ([2d70c01](https://github.com/MorpheApp/morphe-cli/commit/2d70c016f293ba382266fb5c800073f763d633d8))


### Features

* Add GUI third party patch sources, add experimental app patching ([#98](https://github.com/MorpheApp/morphe-cli/issues/98)) ([da5ec1c](https://github.com/MorpheApp/morphe-cli/commit/da5ec1c7e2165a35f8d42b88401a19a958ee25d4))

### Bug Fixes

* **Instagram:** Fix `Make ephemeral media permanent` patch ([fc22c94](https://github.com/crimera/piko/commit/fc22c94eb323fbc5ce12591e4a06c2dd4e590a88))


### Features

* **Instagram:** Added `Change like animation` patch ([cb759bc](https://github.com/crimera/piko/commit/cb759bcab2e754a794a907846e077a956416e363))
